Title: dict_inc_or_put
Description: Creates or increments an integer counter for a given key and a dictionary.

The function checks whether dict contains key .
If it isn't so then the function checks the datatype of the value associated with the key.
An error 42000 is signalled in case of non-integer value or a negative integer value.
If the value is positive then value_decrement is added to it and the result become the new value associated with key in dict .
If key is not in the dictionary then a new item is added to the dict in order to associate the key with value_increment .
